,"zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7595452336974089241","book_info":{"abstract":"这不是一个关于“如何杀死僵尸”的故事，而是关于“如何在所有规则崩塌后，依然选择成为帮助者”。在人人自保的末日，这群人选择逆行——不是因为勇敢，而是因为那是他们唯一会做的事。\n当救援成为文明最后的火种，这本手册记录的，就是人类不愿熄灭的光芒。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o1d0bc062ac279b8159ee487dec95f574~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"麟枫","author_id":"","book_id":"7595452336974089241","book_name":"末世救援实用手册","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":8,\"name\":\"科幻末世\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8\u0026name=科幻末世\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":68,\"name\":\"末世\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68\u0026name=末世\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7595454946045067801","read_count":"102","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"891517"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"168","tags":"科幻末世,末世","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o1d0bc062ac279b8159ee487dec95f574~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779333534\u0026x-signature=rrv0O21aQO2%2BFBjoewVjnyMjK%2Fw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1407794449759184","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"8"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260322111854A89456FB1552E70BDB3A\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":73},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1769429175,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_t
